# viettelidc_ovpc_backup_record (Data Source)

Lookup a Backup Record by ID in a VPC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `backup_plan_id` (String) Filter by Backup Plan ID.
- `id` (String) Backup Record ID.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID to search within. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the backup was created.
- `status` (String) Status of the backup record.
- `volume_id` (String) ID of the volume that was backed up.
- `volume_name` (String) Name of the volume that was backed up.
- `volume_size` (Number) Size of the volume that was backed up.
